title: adenostyles australis
intro: Adenostyles australis, also known as the autralian false hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to New Zealand and southeastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenostyles australis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
